zh.title: 币安币/美元技术分析：短线偏弱震荡，关注关键支撑
zh.content:
从当前价格表现来看，BNB/USD报680.9美元，24小时小幅上涨0.49%，但价格仍明显运行于20日均线696.98美元下方，显示中短期趋势仍偏空。市场虽有一定买盘支撑，但反弹力度有限，整体维持弱势震荡格局。

技术指标方面，MACD数值为-7.25，处于零轴下方，反映空头动能仍占据优势。尽管RSI数据暂未提供，但结合价格持续受压于均线之下判断，市场尚未形成明确的超买或强势反转信号，投资者需保持谨慎。

关键价位上，短线支撑关注674美元附近，该位置对应日内低点区域，若失守则可能进一步下探665美元一线。上方阻力首先位于681-685美元区间，其后为20日均线所在的697美元附近，突破后有望改善技术结构。

交易策略方面，激进投资者可关注674美元附近企稳后的短线反弹机会，目标看向690-697美元区域；稳健投资者则建议等待价格重新站上20日均线后再考虑顺势布局。当前整体仍以区间交易思路为主，需严格控制仓位及止损风险。

en.title: Binance Coin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
BNB/USD is trading at 680.9, posting a modest 0.49% gain over the last 24 hours while remaining below its 20-day simple moving average at 696.98. This positioning suggests that the broader short-term trend remains mildly bearish despite recent buying interest. The session range between 674.07 and 681.45 indicates relatively stable price action, with buyers defending lower levels but lacking sufficient momentum to challenge key overhead resistance zones.

The moving average structure remains a concern for bulls. Trading nearly 16 points below the SMA(20) reflects persistent downward pressure and signals that the market has not yet regained its short-term bullish footing. Meanwhile, the MACD value of -7.25 points to negative momentum and suggests that sellers still maintain an advantage. Although the signal line is unavailable, the negative MACD reading alone indicates that upward moves may face resistance unless momentum improves significantly.

From a price structure perspective, immediate support is located near 674, the recent intraday low. A break below this level could expose the 665-670 area, where additional buying interest may emerge. On the upside, resistance is evident around 681-682, corresponding to the recent high. A successful breakout above this barrier could open the path toward 690 and eventually the SMA(20) near 697, which represents a more significant technical hurdle.

Traders may consider a cautious approach while BNB remains below the 20-day average. Short-term bullish setups become more attractive only after a confirmed break above 682 with increasing momentum. Conversely, failure to hold 674 could favor additional downside pressure. Risk management remains essential, with stop-loss placement below key support for long positions and above resistance for short positions. Until a decisive breakout occurs, range-trading strategies between support and resistance may offer the most balanced risk-reward profile.
